args: set -e; export FOXCODE_PROJECT_DIR="$PWD"; cd "$1"/channel; NPM_BIN="$(dirname "$(command -v node)")/npm"; [ -x "$NPM_BIN" ] || NPM_BIN="$(command -v npm)"; [ -x "$NPM_BIN" ] || { echo 'foxcode: npm not found alongside node or in PATH' >&2; exit 1; }; "$NPM_BIN" ci --omit=dev --silent; exec node server.mjs
